  Fix 2: "Replace 'CorrectName' with 'WrongName'"

=== Quick Fix Application Results ===

=== [D1] Fix 0: "Disable classSelfMismatch for this line" ===

=== [D1] Fix 1: "Disable classSelfMismatch for entire file" ===
skipped by default

=== [D1] Fix 2: "Replace 'CorrectName' with 'WrongName'" ===

--- file:///.src/classSelfMismatch_service.ts ---
import { ServiceMap, Effect } from "effect"

// @effect-expect-leaking FileSystem Cache
export class CorrectName extends ServiceMap.Service<CorrectName, {
  writeCache: () => Effect.Effect<void, never, FileSystem | Cache>
  readCache: Effect.Effect<void, never, FileSystem | Cache>
}>()("CorrectName") {}

// @effect-expect-leaking FileSystem Cache
export class WrongName extends ServiceMap.Service<WrongName, {
  writeCache: () => Effect.Effect<void, never, FileSystem | Cache>
  readCache: Effect.Effect<void, never, FileSystem | Cache>
}>()("WrongName") {}
